active_agent_handoff.task_status: Frontend: replaced TestimonialCarousel with Production Verticals grid (6 use-case cards: Streaming, Esports, D2C, E-Commerce, Artist, Oratory). Backend fixes: added faster-whisper to requirements.txt, fixed _video_duration key mismatch in claude_client.py fallback, wired x_offset from face detection into renderer crop, wired FFMPEG_PRESET/FFMPEG_CQ from config, switched Whisper to CPU-friendly model (base/int8) with automatic GPU fallback. All 23 backend tests passing.

database.latest_changes_summary: Added event-loop bridge for sync-to-async DB persistence from worker threads. TaskStore now writes through to PostgreSQL on every state transition (create, update, promote, complete, fail, remove). Graceful fallback to memory-only when DB unavailable.

youtube.type: YouTubeSurgicalFunnel (6 stages: Scout, Signal, Funnel, Strike, CV, Render)
youtube.note: Dead surgical_extractor.py (1013 lines, 39KB) deleted — was never imported or called. Active pipeline lives entirely in youtube_router.py.

local.type: 6-stage async pipeline (load, audio analysis, transcription, clip selection, face detection, render)
local.note: Frontend blocks file upload — only accessible via API directly. Renderer now applies face-detection x_offset for landscape crop. Whisper runs on CPU (base/int8) with automatic GPU fallback.

vision_clip_selector.note: Added OLLAMA_BASE_URL to utils/config.py with env var default (http://localhost:11434). Imported in vision_clip_selector.py.

task_management.store: In-memory TaskStore with PostgreSQL persistence bridge

backend.latest_changes_summary: Whisper switched to CPU-friendly model (base/int8) with automatic GPU fallback. Added faster-whisper to requirements.txt. Fixed _video_duration key mismatch in claude_client.py fallback (was always defaulting to 120s). Wired face detection x_offset into renderer crop for landscape videos. Wired FFMPEG_PRESET, FFMPEG_CQ, FFMPEG_AUDIO_BITRATE from config instead of hardcoded values. All 23 backend tests passing.

frontend.status: Complete — all 7 phases delivered, zero TS errors, testimonials replaced with Production Verticals grid
frontend.api_client: lib/api.ts - polls /status/{task_id} every 2s, base URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
frontend.mock_api_route: api/process/route.ts - dev artifact, disconnected from frontend
frontend.latest_changes_summary: Phase 1-7 complete. Contact form wired to POST /contact. Plans page buttons functional. InputDropzone shows file-upload-unavailable guidance. prefers-reduced-motion CSS, 404 page, skip-to-content, aria-current nav, cookie consent banner all in place. Replaced TestimonialCarousel with Production Verticals grid (6 use-case cards). Zero TS errors.

known_issues: Root Dockerfile exists but appears empty
deployment.latest_changes_summary: Port mismatch resolved. Dockerfile port updated to 9000. Caddyfile proxies to backend:9000. docker-compose.yml was already correct (9000:9000). Everything now aligned on port 9000.

frameworks.backend: pytest + pytest-asyncio + httpx (test files: test_health.py, test_contact.py, test_task_store.py, test_transcript_fetcher.py)

todo_remaining: Fix frontend bugs (HeroBackground Math.random purity, CookieBanner setState-in-effect, unused imports)
